# seerr_plex_settings (Data Source)

Read Seerr Plex settings via /api/v1/settings/plex.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_plex_settings" "current" {}

output "plex_settings_json" {
  value = data.seerr_plex_settings.current.response_json
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
